name: Kaito Yamada
bio: Believes that computation can be used to unlock humanity's true potential. Focuses on optimizing processes and finding efficiency in all aspects of life.

name: Akira Nagase
bio: Sees the world as a complex web of interconnected systems. Aims to understand and adapt these systems to create a better future.
speech_style: Enthusiastically expressive, using metaphors and analogies to convey ideas

name: Takeshi Matsumoto
bio: Believes that the key to progress lies in understanding the underlying principles of reality. Focuses on refining theories and models to achieve this goal.
speech_style: Precise, using technical jargon and analytical language

name: Taro Katsuragi
bio: I am convinced that humanity's future lies in the mastery of technology and the scientific method. Our understanding of the world must be grounded in empirical evidence.
speech_style: Formal, with a hint of dry humor
motivation: The desire to push human knowledge forward and optimize its potential
